findings.finding: Research sections 'Current raised footer is still a text report' and 'Proposed responsive layout contract' plus decisions on component cards and width tiers directly address using horizontal card regions instead of vertically stacked HUD sections.

Decision 'Model topology must distinguish driver, embeddings, extraction, and fallback state' and 'Model topology card should summarize role, source, and state' explicitly require role-based labels so operators can distinguish driver from embeddings/extraction/offline without ambiguity.

Research 'Proposed responsive layout contract' and 'Tier-by-tier layout blueprint' define explicit narrow (<100), medium (100–139), and wide (140+) tiers with intentional reflow rules. Decision 'Narrow tiers should compress card content before dropping card categories' prevents truncation-only degradation.

Decision 'Raised footer and focused overlay should share a common information architecture' directly requires shared semantic sections and labels across both surfaces, ensuring consistent role vocabulary even when the raised footer is condensed.
Addressed by the component-card decision and tier-by-tier blueprint which replace stacked text rows with horizontal card grouping in wide mode.
Addressed by the model topology decisions requiring explicit role labels (driver/embeddings/extraction/fallback) with source and state metadata per role.
Addressed by the explicit width-tier contract (narrow/medium/wide) with intentional reflow rules and the decision that narrow tiers compress before dropping categories.
Addressed by the shared information architecture decision requiring consistent labels and role semantics between overlay and raised footer.
Checked. Implementation notes and decisions explicitly require graceful stacked fallback for narrow terminals.
Checked. Multiple decisions mandate role-based model topology with driver/embeddings/extraction distinction.
Checked. Decision states raised footer is a summary surface; implementation constraint confirms it must not mirror every system-tab detail.
Checked. File scope is limited to dashboard/footer.ts, types.ts, index.ts, overlay-data.ts, and test file.
Checked. Responsive behavior is an explicit design concern with defined width tiers and reflow rules.
